collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (4 total Queries, 4 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT km.*, GROUP_CONCAT(vt.village_name) AS VillageNames FROM kaadaimembers AS km LEFT JOIN village_table AS vt ON (km.Familymembershipid = vt.Coordinator_id OR km.Familymembershipid = vt.Coordinator_Two_id) WHERE km.Role = 2 AND km.isShow = 1 GROUP BY km.Familymembershipid ORDER BY km.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT km.*, GROUP_CONCAT(vt.village_name) AS VillageNames FROM kaadaimembers AS km LEFT JOIN village_table AS vt ON (km.Familymembershipid = vt.Coordinator_id OR km.Familymembershipid = vt.Coordinator_Two_id) WHERE km.Role = 2 AND km.isShow = 1 GROUP BY km.Familymembershipid ORDER BY km.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0
